headline.text: L1 S2 tunnel 3 belt slipped for *3 hours* on salt buildup — cleared by 18:22, then ran out of almonds at 19:43, resumed 21:42.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran almond cluster on S2 with multiple salt-related belt issues and a material outage; S3 fought MM5 X-ray errors and checkweigher drift through the afternoon; S4 had an overheating motor requiring a cooling fan.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 truffle line saw repeated belt transitions causing product to jump and blow off, resulting in ~68K pieces of accumulation transferred to L3 for rework. ML3 paused briefly for flow wrap adjustments at shift start.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 ran a changeover with recurring Cavanna chain and printer issues that cleared by early morning. Truffle line found a broken Cavanna 1 sensor. MF Matrix ran out of pouches mid-shift with no returns completed.

notes.text: Barrels of chocolate (10169 HER) plugged in at 13:45 and should be ready for use.
Katya flagged ongoing cold chocolate barrel deliveries; Justin scheduling a meeting to fix the process.
Alan Todd directed that ML2 truffle accumulation (2 pallets, ~68K pieces) be sent to L3 for wrapping on Cute Cavanna 3rd shift tomorrow.

resolved.title: S3 MM5 X-ray safety switch misaligned
resolved.summary: X-ray threw error at 13:22, maintenance found safety switch far apart; adjusted front legs and sensor, working better by 17:43.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 17:43 — "It's working better" after adjustments (Caleb York). Delia confirmed at 16:57: "MM5 restored and working very well."

resolved.title: S2 tunnel 3 belt slipping on salt buildup
resolved.summary: Belt slipping reported at 16:28, multiple cleaning and tension adjustments; cleared by 18:22 with belt washer running.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:22 — "Started at the Enrober again at 6:05 PM. Belt running with little to no slippage" (Conner Boyd).

resolved.title: S2 ran out of almonds
resolved.summary: Line down at 19:43 for material; trailer arrived at L3, almonds delivered, line resumed at 21:42.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:42 — "Line resumed at 9:05 PM" after almond delivery (Conner Boyd).

resolved.title: S3 mixing tank out of calibration after caustic clean
resolved.summary: Post-clean calibration drift caught at 10:19; maintenance recalibrated and cleared by 11:06.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 11:06 — "Calibration is done in the kitchen" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: S3 tunnel 1 belt frayed
resolved.summary: Frayed piece found at 17:43, line paused; maintenance cut, removed frayed section, ATP passed, line resumed at 18:12.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:12 — "Fray cut, removed, area passed ATP; line running again" (Caleb York, William Beattie).

resolved.title: S2 product pieces sticking together
resolved.summary: Salt buildup and caramel trailing from depositor caused pieces to stick in groups of 2–5; depositor and tunnel 2 belt adjustments separated drops by 18:44.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:44 — "Changes made at depositor and tunnel 2 belt have drops adequately separated" (Conner Boyd).

resolved.title: S2 M7 printer illegible
resolved.summary: Printer illegible at 18:48, pallets placed on hold; label window adjusted, print improved by 21:44.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:44 — "M7 printer improved a bit; letters and numbers now more clearly visible" (Alfonsina Gil). Caleb York worked on it.

resolved.title: S3 MM4 sealer causing accumulation
resolved.summary: Sealer issues on MM4 at 03:35 caused accumulation; team fixed issues, passed accumulation, line started running by 03:55.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 03:55 — "We pass all the accumulation and line start running" (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: S2 scheduled reheat
resolved.summary: Temper bar steady at 3.8–4.1, line down for scheduled reheat at 04:07; line started at 06:27.

resolved.title: ML2 belt transition causing product to jump
resolved.summary: Product jumping at belt before metal detector starting 21:20; maintenance adjusted nose bar, line up 22:43, back down 23:00, finally cleared by 01:35.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:35 — "Line is up" after repeated adjustments (Gustavo Rodas).

resolved.title: ML2 demolder belt replaced
resolved.summary: Old belt shifted excessively preventing product flow; new belt installed, ATP passed, satisfactory results by 13:57.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 13:57 — "Demolder belt replaced, ATP testing satisfactory" (Claudio Tovar).

resolved.title: ML3 flow wrap adjustments needed
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 06:33 for flow wrap adjustments at shift start; line up by 06:54.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:54 — "The line up" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna chain and jaw issues through changeover
resolved.summary: Chain installed backwards 2nd shift, causing cutting bar to split in two; corrected, cavanna running by 23:43.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 23:43 — "2345 cavanna is now running" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap). Chain was on backwards, turned around, then problems cleared.

resolved.title: Truffle Cavanna 2 phasing and alignment off
resolved.summary: Cavanna 2 needed phasing sensor, timing, infeed belts, and guide rails adjusted after cleaning at 07:39; likely due to rollers placed in different positions during reassembly.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:39 — Nathan Ruiz adjusted phasing sensor, timing, aligned infeed belts and guide rails. Nathan noted: "High possibility rollers were put in different positions from where they were originally."

resolved.title: ML1 printer sensor head misaligned
resolved.summary: Printer not working at 04:00, line paused; maintenance adjusted sensor head position, working well by 05:19.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:19 — "It was the sensor head position. Maintenance adjusted it. It's working well now" (Raoul Lubain).

needs_attention.title: S4 FW motor overheating
needs_attention.summary: FW stopping every 20 seconds at 16:02, scrap building fast; maintenance placed fan on overheating motor, line running but motor still overheating as of 20:30.
needs_attention.status: Fan installed on motor, line running as of 16:37 but Preston confirmed motor still overheating at 20:30. Erandy asked if motor replacement falls under warranty.

needs_attention.title: S3 rework boats/cans open, traceability unclear
needs_attention.summary: Karen flagged at 06:22 that most boats in rework are open, can't confirm if they went through cap sealing and X-ray; tag doesn't indicate pending processes, some cans have candy exposed.
needs_attention.status: Karen identified the issue at 06:22 during rework; no confirmation of hold or disposition by window close.

needs_attention.title: Chocolate barrel supply — arriving cold
needs_attention.summary: Katya reports past few weeks of struggle with chocolate barrels requested as level 1; every delivery arrives cold and not usable. Justin scheduling meeting to fix process.
needs_attention.status: Justin scheduling a meeting to discuss process with Rich Brierley, Rose Smuin, German Cervantes. Ongoing issue as of 12:14 PM.

needs_attention.title: S3 MM3 checkweigher vs. static scale drift
needs_attention.summary: Weight discrepancy between checkweigher and static scale reported at 14:26; Troy and maintenance making adjustments to keep difference under 2g.
needs_attention.status: Troy and maintenance adjusting as of 14:26; no confirmation that scales now match within spec.

needs_attention.title: S3 tape machines not working
needs_attention.summary: EEs accumulating too many boxes at 20:28 due to tape machine failure; only one maintenance person on shift to address.
needs_attention.status: Victor called for maintenance at 20:28. Caleb noted "only one maintenance man here, and he's yet to take lunch." No resolution by window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 MM3 printer issues
needs_attention.summary: Luis reported printer issues on MM3 at 03:55; no follow-up on resolution.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 03:55 with no further updates in window.

needs_attention.title: S2 exhaust fan blower wheel broken
needs_attention.summary: Exhaust fan for SL2 kitchen has broken blower wheel; William ordering replacement, may see condensation from flue pipe in meantime.
needs_attention.status: William will order blower wheel and install when it arrives. Reported at 18:27.

needs_attention.title: ML2 truffle line product blow-off and accumulation
needs_attention.summary: Ongoing challenge with product blown off during wrapping; 1st shift accumulated ~2 pallets (~68K pieces); Alan directed accumulation be sent to L3 for Cute Cavanna wrapping 3rd shift tomorrow, but emphasized need to improve line performance.
needs_attention.status: Alan's message at 17:19 describes ongoing issue: product being blown off, ~2 pallets accumulation. Directed to L3 for rework but emphasized "not a permanent solution" — need to improve line performance and reduce blow-offs.

needs_attention.title: Packaging material shortage for Friday production
needs_attention.summary: Luis flagged at 13:16 that item 40944-V2 (layflat caddie) has qty 0 in NetSuite; need 100K for Friday 7/17 production, only 40K on PO arriving 7/22.
needs_attention.status: Ethan working with AM Lithography to expedite; 40K due 7/22 but need 100K by 7/17. As of 14:18 PM.

needs_attention.title: ML2 missing #10 wrench
needs_attention.summary: Number 10 wrench cannot be found; reported at shift start 22:02 and again at shift end 05:37.
needs_attention.status: Missing at 3rd shift start (22:02) and still missing at shift end (05:37).

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix out of pouches #41227
needs_attention.summary: IMS confirmed out of pouches #41227-v1 at 05:35, no other location; 3rd shift ran out, no returns completed, 1st shift has no pouches to run.
needs_attention.status: Mayra confirmed out of stock at 06:00. Itzel reported at 07:01: "3rd shift run out of pouches, and no returns were completed."

needs_attention.title: Truffle Cavanna 2 belt fraying
needs_attention.summary: Grey reported at 08:00 that one belt on Cavanna 2 starting to fray; maintenance notified to see if can be replaced.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 08:00; no update on replacement by window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix suction cup failed
needs_attention.summary: Raoul called maintenance for suction cup failure at midnight; no resolution shown.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 00:00; no update by window close.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Cavanna 1 broken sensor
needs_attention.summary: Broken sensor found in Cavanna 1 at 07:03.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 07:03 with no follow-up on repair or replacement.
